name: linkedin-job-scraper
description: LinkedIn job scraper + tracker + CV generator

scripts.deploy: rsync -avz --exclude 'node_modules' --exclude '.git' --exclude 'tracker/.next' --exclude 'data/' --exclude 'tracker/prisma/dev.db' --exclude 'logs/' . root@85.9.201.105:/opt/linkedin-job-scraper/ && ssh root@85.9.201.105 'cd /opt/linkedin-job-scraper && rm -rf tracker/node_modules && npm install && DATABASE_URL=file:./tracker/prisma/dev.db npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=tracker/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run tracker:build && pm2 reload all'
scripts.deploy:client: rsync -avz --exclude 'node_modules' --exclude '.git' --exclude 'tracker/.next' --exclude 'data/' --exclude 'tracker/prisma/dev.db' --exclude 'logs/' --exclude '.env' --exclude 'config.js' . root@85.9.201.105:/opt/linkedin-job-scraper-client1/ && ssh root@85.9.201.105 'cd /opt/linkedin-job-scraper-client1 && rm -rf tracker/node_modules && npm install && DATABASE_URL=file:./tracker/prisma/dev.db npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=tracker/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run tracker:build && pm2 reload tracker-client1 && pm2 reload scraper-client1'
